title: Slovakian Chicken Pilaf
description: A hearty Slovakian-inspired dish featuring chicken and pilaf, cooked to perfection.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned on both sides, about 5-6 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the sausage to the skillet and cook until browned, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the onion and garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the pilaf to the skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken broth to the skillet and bring to a boil.
Return the chicken to the skillet and reduce heat to low.
Simmer, covered, for 10-12 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through and the pilaf is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley, if desired.
